final:
module top_module (
	input [15:0] p,
	input [15:0] q,
	output [15:0] out_xor,
	output [15:0] out_not);assign out_xor = p ^ q;
assign out_not = ~p;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out_xor <= p & q; out_not <= p | q;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: out_xor <= p & q; out_not <= p | q;
